patch.value: Surface extension command handler error messages instead of opaque extension_command_handler_failed code

When an extension command handler throws, src/core/extensions/loader.ts:2869-2882 catches the error and discards error.message, returning only a generic warning code extension_command_handler_failed:<layer>:<name>:<command>. src/cli/main.ts:922 then surfaces just that code with a generic 'Adjust command input or tracker state and retry' hint. Agents and CI cannot see WHY the handler failed. Concrete impact: the 2026-05-25 CI static-gate failure on main commit 15c0c80b printed only 'extension_command_handler_failed:project:pm-changelog:changelog generate' while the real, actionable cause from pm-changelog was 'Changelog is out of date: CHANGELOG.md'. Fix: capture a sanitized, length-bounded handler error message in the warning and surface it in the PmCliError so agents/CI get the real cause. Token-efficient agent UX win.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented: (1) added optional errorMessage to CommandHandlerResult (extension-types.ts); (2) runCommandHandler now normalizes the caught handler error via describeHandlerError (single-line, 300-char bounded) and returns it as errorMessage (loader.ts); (3) main.ts appends the cause to the PmCliError detail. Telemetry path already sanitizes outcome.error via sanitizeString(captureLevel), so no path leakage to telemetry; console shows the user's own path which is expected. Verified before/after with pm changelog generate --check: now prints 'Changelog is out of date: <path>'. Tests updated in extension-loader.spec.ts + cli.integration.spec.ts; both pass, build green.

patch.value: Added optional errorMessage to CommandHandlerResult; runCommandHandler normalizes the caught handler error (single-line, 300-char bounded) into it; main.ts appends the cause to the PmCliError detail. Telemetry stays redacted (warning code unchanged; outcome.error already sanitized). Verified end-to-end with pm-changelog and a synthetic failing extension.
Agents/CI see the real handler failure cause (e.g. 'Changelog is out of date: <path>') alongside the extension_command_handler_failed code.

Before: only the opaque 'extension_command_handler_failed:project:pm-changelog:changelog generate' code was shown. After: the cause message is appended to the error detail (also present in --json envelope detail).
Extension handler error surfacing implemented, tested (unit + integration), and verified end-to-end; full release gate green.
